devices.title: Devices
devices.subtitle: {{count}} device(s) registered to your account
devices.confirmRemoveHint: The device will be signed out immediately if it is connected.
devices.loadErrorHint: Check the server connection and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your connection, appearance, and device.
settings.serverHint: The FileSync server this app connects to.
settings.accentColorHint: Brand color used for buttons, gradients, and icons.
settings.customColorHint: Click the swatch to pick any color
settings.appearanceHint: Light, dark, or follow the system setting.
settings.loggingHintSuffix: in the app data directory. Default is Warn.
settings.logDebugDescription: Everything — all requests, data flow, decisions
settings.logWarnDescription: Problems only — failures, retries, unexpected states
settings.logErrorDescription: Failures only — exceptions and hard errors
settings.devicesHint: All devices registered to your account.
settings.updatesHint: New versions are published on GitHub. Choose how this app applies them.
settings.updateAutoHint: Download and install new versions in the background, then prompt to restart.
settings.updateManualHint: Only notify when an update is available — you choose when to install.
settings.updateStatusIdle: Updates are checked automatically in the background.
settings.updateStatusReady: Version {{version}} is ready — restart to apply.
settings.channelStableHint: Only official releases. Recommended for most people.
settings.channelBetaHint: Get -beta prereleases early. May be less stable.
settings.notificationsHint: Show desktop notifications for errors and updates when the app isn't focused.
settings.notificationsDenied: Notification permission denied — enable it for FileSync in System Settings.

updates.readyToast: Update v{{version}} installed — restart to apply
updates.bannerReady: Version v{{version}} is ready. Restart to finish updating.

folders.newFolderHint: Give it a name. Each device picks its own local directory to sync with it.
folders.name: Name
folders.emptyHint: Create a sync folder, then link a local directory on each device you want to keep in sync.
folders.linkHintSuffix: to choose a local directory to sync.
folders.loadErrorHint: Check the server connection and try again.
folders.chooseLocalFolderHint: Select the folder on this device to sync with <0>{{name}}</0>.

folderDetail.notLinkedTitle: This device is not linked on the server.
folderDetail.notLinkedHint: Go back and use "Link folder" to connect a local directory.
folderDetail.noActiveLocalPath: No active local path — sync watcher not running on this device
folderDetail.filesLoadError: Could not load files — check server connection.

conflicts.title: Conflicts
conflicts.loadErrorHint: Check the server connection and try again.
conflicts.noConflictsHint: Everything is in sync. Conflicts appear here when two devices edit the same file before syncing.
conflicts.keepBothHint: "Keep Both" saves the other version with a conflict suffix, so nothing is lost.

health.title: Health check
health.hint: Verify everything FileSync needs to sync correctly on this device.
health.serverError: Cannot reach the server. Check the URL in Settings and your network.
health.authError: Not signed in. Sign in again to sync.
health.notificationsDenied: Denied — enable notifications for FileSync in System Settings.
health.foldersOk: All linked folders are readable and writable
health.foldersNone: No folders linked on this device yet.
health.versionOutdated: Update available — you have v{{current}}, latest is v{{latest}}

permissions.settingsHint: Choose a different location or grant access in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Files and Folders.
permissions.cantAccess: FileSync can't access the files in this folder. {{hint}}
permissions.cantRead: FileSync can't read the files in this folder. {{hint}}
permissions.cantWrite: FileSync can't write to this folder. {{hint}}

sync.scanIssuesDesc: {{count}} item(s) were skipped and won't sync. {{reason}}
sync.scanPermissionReason: This looks like a Windows file-permissions issue — give FileSync access to the folder (or run it with sufficient rights), then re-link the folder.
sync.scanGenericReason: Some items couldn't be read — they may be locked, open in another program, too deeply nested, or outside FileSync's allowed locations.
